title: Casualness Delight
description:
A subsidiary module of Farmer's Delight
Added some British food and the author's casual thoughts
body: This is an extension module of Farmer's Delight, which includes some food from Europe and the author's casual ideas. Now it adds Five new edibles called: Stargazy Pie,Quiche Lorraine,Yorkshire pudding,Fish and Chips,Beef noodles.You can make cheese now!
